Metadata.title: Certo Governance Institute Foundation
Metadata.description: An independent rating body assessing the quality of governance in the public, corporate, medical and defence sectors.

Home.title: Certo Governance Institute
Home.description: A public credibility index based on governance quality.
Home.hero_title: Do you know how your hospital, government office, or company is really managed?
Home.hero_subtitle: We are creating the world's first unified public credibility index based on governance quality. We don't assess declarations — we measure the actual behaviour of institutions.
Home.why_title: The world measures everything. Except governance quality.
Home.why_text: We have sophisticated tools for measuring financial risk, product quality, and carbon footprint. But no one has yet built a comparable system that measures the quality of governance itself — how institutions make decisions, account for their consequences, and protect the trust of those they serve. This is the G gap in ESG — and Rating Certo fills it.
Home.why_rhetorical: How many times have you heard about poor governance destroying institutions from within — and no one measured it before it was too late?
Home.founder_quote: For forty years I observed how public offices, hospitals, companies and organisations function. I came to the conviction that the right to live in a society governed honestly, transparently and competently is a fundamental right — just like the right to education, healthcare or a fair trial.
Home.founder_certo_quote: Certo means certainty — and that is exactly why I am establishing a Foundation, not a company: because some things should not belong to anyone, so they can serve everyone.
Home.pillars_subtitle: Each assessment is based on five measurable dimensions of governance quality.
Home.pillar_1_short: Does the organisation do what it should, when it should?
Home.pillar_2_short: Is the relationship with stakeholders healthy and responsive?
Home.pillar_3_short: Are decisions made with proper procedure?
Home.pillar_4_short: How stable and predictable is the organisation's structure?
Home.pillar_5_short: How openly does the organisation communicate with its environment?
Home.denoiser_title: From information noise to a credible assessment
Home.denoiser_layer_1_desc: We collect data from public registers, analytical databases and open sources — both Polish and international.
Home.denoiser_layer_2_desc: We filter, weight and normalise information signals. We eliminate noise, duplicates and contradictions.
Home.denoiser_layer_3_desc: We deliver a structured risk picture to the analyst instead of raw information noise.
Home.denoiser_quote: The human makes rating decisions. The system provides better material on which that decision can be more accurate and faster.
Home.rhetorical_standard: Why has no one yet created a credible, global standard for assessing governance quality?
Home.product_roadmap_desc: A transparent development roadmap for organisations — stage, achievements, plans and development needs visible to investors, partners and society.
Home.product_whistleblower_desc: Secure, encrypted channels for reporting irregularities with full whistleblower data protection and case monitoring.
Home.product_own_desc: An ownership register — a structured system for identifying beneficial owners, capital structures and ownership relationships.
Home.product_certoid_desc: A user panel with detailed rating data, organisation profiles and analytical tools.
Home.pilot_cta_title: Register your institution for the free pilot programme
Home.pilot_cta_text: In Q4 2026, we are launching the first public credibility assessment processes based on governance quality. The pilot is free of charge. Your organisation can help shape the new standard.

About.title: About Certo Governance Institute Foundation
About.mission_text: We build a culture of good governance through independent assessment and promotion of governance standards in Poland and Europe. We believe that the right to live in a society governed honestly, transparently and competently is a fundamental right.
About.organ_board_role: Executive body — manages day-to-day operations, represents the Foundation externally, pursues statutory objectives.
About.organ_supervisory_role: Supervisory body — oversees the Board's activities, audits compliance with the statute, protects the Foundation's independence.
About.organ_standard_role: Methodological body — designs and approves the rating methodology, validates weighting systems and sector calibration.
About.organ_advisory_role: Expert council — provides specialist knowledge, supports the Board's strategic decisions.
About.organ_international_role: Global perspective — advises on international best practices and compliance with global standards.
About.organ_tribunal_role: Independent appeals body — resolves disputes concerning ratings, ensures the right of appeal.
About.founder_preamble: For forty years I observed how public offices, hospitals, companies and organisations function. I came to the conviction that the right to live in a society governed honestly, transparently and competently is a fundamental right — just like the right to education, healthcare or a fair trial.
About.founder_quote: Certo means certainty — and that is exactly why I am establishing a Foundation, not a company: because some things should not belong to anyone, so they can serve everyone.
About.principle_independence_desc: The independence of governance assessment depends not on the character of individuals, but on institutional architecture: the statute, funding mechanisms and accountability systems.
About.principle_reproducibility_desc: Every Rating Certo must be reproducible based on the published methodology and available source data.
About.principle_transparency_desc: The methodology is public and auditable. The assessed entity has the right to know what IT tools were used in the assessment process.
About.entity_foundation_desc: Independent rating body, owner of the methodology. Designs the standard, publishes ratings, accredits advisors. Does not sell software.
About.entity_company_desc: Commercial technology operator. Builds and maintains the Certo platform, ensures data security, develops AI tools under the Foundation's supervision.
About.statute_desc: The Statute of Certo Governance Institute Foundation defines the objectives, organisational structure, principles of independence and oversight mechanisms.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Certo Governance Institute Foundation
Contact.form_success: Your message has been sent. We will respond as soon as possible.

Pilot.title: Rating Certo Pilot Programme
Pilot.subtitle: Register your institution for the free public credibility assessment process based on governance quality — Q4 2026.
Pilot.program_description: In Q4 2026, we are launching the first free assessment processes as part of the public credibility index based on governance quality — Rating Certo.
Pilot.sector_public_desc: Local government units, public administration institutions, municipal companies.
Pilot.sector_corporate_desc: Commercial law companies, enterprises, industry organisations.
Pilot.timeline_title: What does the process look like?
Pilot.step_1_desc: Complete the application form and describe your motivation.
Pilot.step_2_desc: Our team will assess the organisation's profile and match the appropriate assessment path.
Pilot.step_3_desc: Carrying out the assessment process according to the Rating Certo methodology.
Pilot.step_4_desc: You will receive a detailed report with an assessment and recommendations.
Pilot.benefits_title: Benefits of participating in the pilot
Pilot.benefit_1: Free public credibility assessment of your organisation
Pilot.benefit_2: Influence on shaping the Rating Certo methodology
Pilot.benefit_4: Access to a detailed report with recommendations
Pilot.form_motivation: Why do you want to participate in the pilot?
Pilot.form_consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data for the purpose of considering my application for the Rating Certo pilot programme.
Pilot.form_success: Thank you for your application! We will contact you within 14 business days.
Pilot.form_error: An error occurred. Please try again or write to rating@certogov.org.

Experts.title: Join us in building the standard
Experts.subtitle: We are looking for experts, academics and practitioners who want to participate in creating the first global standard for assessing governance quality.
Experts.profile_governance_desc: Auditors, compliance officers, specialists in corporate governance and public management.
Experts.profile_academic_desc: Researchers in public administration, management, law, institutional economics.
Experts.profile_practitioners_desc: Experienced board members, supervisory board members, directors of public institutions.
Experts.accreditation_desc: We are building an accreditation programme for advisors and experts who want to professionally support organisations in the Rating Certo assessment process.
Experts.cta_desc: Learn more about the advisory programme and cooperation opportunities.

Rating.title: Rating Certo
Rating.subtitle: Public credibility index based on governance quality
Rating.score_desc: An objective, comparable governance quality assessment on a 0–100 scale with a letter designation of AA–D.
Rating.vector_desc: A multidimensional organisation profile showing strengths and areas for improvement.
Rating.index_desc: An annual ranking of governance quality by sector and country.
Rating.pillar_1_desc: Does the organisation do what it should, when it should? Timeliness of obligations, regularity of meetings, completeness of documentation.
Rating.pillar_2_desc: Is the body–stakeholder relationship healthy and responsive? Response time, meeting attendance, fulfilment of commitments.
Rating.pillar_3_desc: Are decisions made with proper procedure? Percentage of decisions with quorum, conflict management, decision-to-execution time.
Rating.pillar_4_desc: How stable and predictable is the organisation's structure? Owner and staff turnover, concentration, continuity of governing bodies.
Rating.pillar_5_desc: How openly does the organisation communicate with its environment? Data completeness, proactivity, multilingualism, data format.
Rating.defacto_subtitle: We measure what organisations actually do — not what they declare.
Rating.defacto_iure_desc: Traditional systems measure what an organisation has on paper: statutes, policies, board composition. That is a photograph.
Rating.defacto_facto_desc: Rating Certo measures actual behaviours: does the board meet regularly? Does it respond to stakeholders? Does it fulfil obligations on time? That is a film.
Rating.human_control_title: Principle of Human Control over Ratings
Rating.human_control_desc: Certo ratings are the result of methodologies designed, approved and supervised by humans. No IT tool has decision-making autonomy in establishing, modifying or publishing ratings.
Rating.accord_title: Certo Accord — the right of appeal
Rating.accord_desc: Every entity subject to assessment has the right to submit comments and to lodge an appeal before the independent Trybunał Odwoławczy Certo.
